title: Model T-Deck shared SPI display and SD chip selects
description: Why this exists: T-Deck LoRa, ST7789 display, and SD card share SPI pins, and current board support only keeps TFT/SD CS deselected with GPIO hogs until those devices are validated. What needs to be done: when display/storage support is enabled, replace or override the CS hogs with proper SPI child nodes or app overlays, verify CS idle behavior, and test bus coexistence with SX1262. Acceptance criteria: display and SD nodes do not assert CS during LoRa transfers; overlays can disable the hog labels cleanly; bus frequency constraints are documented for LoRa, display, and SD.
notes:
Implementation evidence: modeled T-Deck shared SPI3 chip selects with bus-level cs-gpios indexed by child reg: reg0 LoRa CS GPIO9, reg1 TFT CS GPIO12, reg2 SD CS GPIO39 (&gpio1 7). Removed TFT/SD CS GPIO hogs because SPI now owns the CS lines; kept GPIO10 peripheral-power hog. Removed SPIM3_CSEL_GPIO9 from pinctrl so all CS lines are GPIO-managed. Added disabled Zephyr SDHC SPI slot sd@2 and disabled MIPI-DBI/ST7789 node st7789v@1 under root mipi-dbi; display/storage remain disabled until hardware validation. Created follow-ups project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.17 (validate ST7789 parameters), project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.18 (validate SD frequency/storage node), and project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.19 (scope-check shared SPI chip selects); .15 blocks all three. EC2 build evidence: temporary builder i-0d9419791bb231db3 with Zephyr cache vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58; applied local patch to origin/main 9dfb771b; ran west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build/t_deck_gateway_spi_cs -- -DUSE_CCACHE=0. Build passed. Generated config includes CONFIG_FLASH_SIZE=16777216, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE_16MB=y. Generated DTS shows spi3 okay with cs-gpios <&gpio0 9 GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW>, <&gpio0 12 GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW>, <&gpio1 7 GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW>, lora@0 okay, sd@2 disabled, and root mipi-dbi/st7789v@1 disabled. Memory/link: FLASH 213956 B / 16776960 B (1.28%), IRAM 51484 B / 329 KiB, DRAM 92552 B / 313 KiB, IROM 110894 B / 16 MiB, DROM 148420 B / 16 MiB; zephyr.bin 213956 bytes (~209 KiB), zephyr.elf 5.4 MiB.
EC2 cleanup for shared SPI build complete: synced and unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr, detached vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited available, terminated i-0d9419791bb231db3, deleted temporary security group sg-07db409fab4e1c078 and key lichen-tdeck-spi-cs-20260630143436.
Review pass 2 found two issues. High: removing TFT/SD CS hogs left GPIO12/GPIO39 potentially floating while display/storage nodes remain disabled because only enabled SPI clients consume their indexed CS. Fixed by restoring labeled t_deck_tft_cs_hog and t_deck_sd_cs_hog as inactive guards until overlays enable those nodes and remove the hogs. Medium: acceptance wording could imply physical CS scope validation belongs in .15; clarified by keeping .15 as the board model/build validation and using follow-up project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.19 for logic-analyzer/scope proof of real transfers.
Post-review fix/build evidence: restored t_deck_tft_cs_hog and t_deck_sd_cs_hog as inactive guards for disabled display/storage CS lines while keeping SPI3 cs-gpios indexing for future enabled nodes. Rebuilt on temporary EC2 builder i-0a5ea6c900929e57e with Zephyr cache vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58; applied local patch to origin/main 9dfb771b; ran west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build/t_deck_gateway_spi_cs_fix -- -DUSE_CCACHE=0. Build passed. Generated config: CONFIG_FLASH_SIZE=16777216, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y, CONFIG_ESPTOOLPY_FLASHSIZE_16MB=y. Generated DTS evidence includes t_deck_tft_cs_hog and t_deck_sd_cs_hog gpio-hogs, spi3 cs-gpios <&gpio0 9 GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW>, <&gpio0 12 GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW>, <&gpio1 7 GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW>, lora@0, disabled sd@2, and disabled root mipi-dbi/st7789v@1. Memory/link: FLASH 214004 B / 16776960 B (1.28%), IRAM 51484 B / 329 KiB, DRAM 92552 B / 313 KiB, IROM 110986 B / 16 MiB, DROM 148468 B / 16 MiB; zephyr.bin 214004 bytes (~209 KiB), zephyr.elf 5.4 MiB.
Post-fix EC2 cleanup complete: synced/unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr, detached vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited available, terminated i-0a5ea6c900929e57e, deleted temporary security group sg-04b542a481df5a8cd and key lichen-tdeck-spi-cs-fix-20260630144428.
Final codereview outcomes after restoring TFT/SD CS hogs: pass 1 no findings; checked SPI3 cs-gpios GPIO9/GPIO12/GPIO39, LoRa reg0, disabled sd@2, disabled mipi-dbi/st7789v@1, restored inactive hogs, SPIM3_CSEL removal, Beads follow-ups, and git diff --check. Pass 2 no findings; checked restored hogs, cs-gpios indexing, disabled MIPI/SDHC nodes, Zephyr bindings, Beads follow-ups, and EC2 evidence/cleanup. Pass 3 no findings; checked hog inactivity for disabled CS lines, overlay handoff labels/comments, future SPI ownership, gateway display/storage disabled state, and LoRa-safe config. No P0/P1/P2 findings remain.
close_reason: Completed: T-Deck shared SPI chip-select model added with inactive CS hogs, disabled display/storage nodes, build evidence, follow-up validation Beads, and three clean final reviews.
